questions.question: What's included in the free Starter AI Toolkit?
options: You must pay for all AI tools

questions.question: When should you upgrade to paid AI tools?
options: When you use AI daily and need advanced features

questions.question: What should you do with sensitive information?
options: Never input personal or confidential data into AI
Only use paid versions for sensitive data

questions.question: Is using AI for work considered 'cheating'?
options: No, it's a tool like a calculator, but be transparent
Only if you don't disclose it

questions.question: How much time can beginners typically save with AI?
What's important about ethical AI use?
options: Be transparent, verify information, respect privacy

questions.question: Will AI take your job?
options: AI changes how we work; those who learn AI have an advantage

questions.question: What's the best way to continue learning AI?
options: Practice daily, try new tools, join communities

questions.question: What should you do with AI-generated information?
options: Verify important facts and use professional judgment
Only verify if it seems wrong

questions.question: What's the main takeaway from this course?
options: AI is a powerful tool anyone can learn to use effectively
AI will do everything for you
